title: Match sought — Delhi MBA
body: Well-educated Delhi family seeks suitable match for their daughter, 29, working in finance. Preferred partner: well-settled, graduate, non-smoker.

title: In loving memory of R. Sharma
body: R. Sharma (1942–2026) passed away peacefully at home on 18 April. Survived by his wife Meena and two daughters. Prayers at Lodhi Crematorium, 23 April, 11 AM.

title: Change of name — A. K. Verma
body: I, Anand Kumar Verma, son of late S. K. Verma, resident of Sector 21, Noida, have changed my name to Anand Verma. Affidavit dated 10 April 2026.

title: 2BHK Lodhi Estate
body: Ground-floor 2BHK in Lodhi Estate, unfurnished, park facing. Rent ₹65,000/month. Available May 1. Brokers excuse.

title: 2021 Mahindra XUV300
body: Single owner, 32,000 km, full service history, petrol, manual. Priced at ₹8.5 lakh, neg. Sold as-is.
